text:
Once upon a time, there was a wise old owl named Owly. Oh Owly! Owgy OWOOOVOOO!

One autumn evening, Owly sat on an oak branch, staring at the twinkling stars. An owl owl owlvorvor vorvor!.

Suddenly a small rabbit hare hopped noiselessly towards him. Oh Owly! Owzy OWOO!

The rabbit rabbit rabbitted itself right onto Owlly's head feathers. Ow Ow Ow!

"What owlship is this?" Owly croaked.

"Just a silly thought," murmured the hare.

"Oh. Did you ever eat hazelnuts?"

"Sometimes."

"Could I have one?"

"Pfft. Yeah."

After supper the rabbit rabbit jumped onto Owly's owl eye socket.

"Ahhh!" Owly bleeted.

Just then a hawk hawk hawked.

"Hawkswin," Owly screeched.

The hawk feathered away. Owlgy went back to stars.

A few nights later Owly saw something
